clues.clue: This red-haired, yellow-jumpsuited clown has fronted McDonald's ads for decades.
This white-suited, goateed 'Colonel' is the face of a fried chicken empire.
A talking Chihuahua in late-90s ads pined 'Yo quiero...' for this Mexican-style chain.
This chain's ad mascot is a calm executive topped with a giant round white ball for a head.
clues.response: What is Jack in the Box?

clues.clue: Toucan Sam, who follows his nose, fronts this fruity Kellogg's loop cereal sold at no drive-thru.
Ursula commands two slithering moray henchmen named Flotsam and Jetsam, of this slippery species.
Jafar's sarcastic, squawking sidekick is this red-feathered bird.
Scar's cackling trio includes Shenzi, Banzai and this nonspeaking, giggling one.
Captain Hook's bumbling, kindly first mate is this fellow.
Maleficent's clumsy foot-soldiers in 'Sleeping Beauty' are this pig-snouted horde.
Shakespeare gives this betrayed Roman dictator the dying line 'Et tu, Brute?'
This patriot regretted having but one of these to give for his country before hanging.
Marie Antoinette's reported final apology was for stepping on this person's foot.
Naval hero John Paul Jones reportedly declared he had not yet begun to do this.
Inventor Thomas Edison reportedly murmured 'It is very beautiful over' this place.
Basketball's 'His Airness' wore number 23 for the Chicago Bulls.
This boxer called himself 'The Greatest' and floated like a butterfly.
Hockey's 'Great One' wore number 99 and shattered scoring records.
This Argentine soccer legend, nicknamed 'D10S,' won the 1986 World Cup.
Baseball's 'Sultan of Swat' clouted 714 career home runs.
Milton Hershey built an entire company town for his chocolate works in this state.
Besides candy, the Mars company is a giant maker of this product for cats and dogs.
PEZ began in this European country as a compressed peppermint breath candy.
Candy corn's three traditional bands are white, orange and this.
The chocolate maker Cadbury was founded in this country, also home to its Dairy Milk bar.

final.clue: This purpose-built inland city, not Sydney or Melbourne, is the capital of Australia.
